Title: Create an account and activate carriers
Begin by going to `Envia.com <https://www.envia.com>`_.
navigate to Developers --> API Keys
click add to generate a new key
Retrieve it at any time by returning to the API Keys section
This key is required to authenticate Odoo's connection with Envia.com.

going to Inventory --> Configuration --> Delivery Methods
create a delivery method by going to Inventory... and click New
Fill out the following form fields: - Shipping Method
Provider: Select Envia from the drop-down menu
Delivery Product: The product listed on the sales order...
In the Envia Configuration tab, enter the Envia Production Access Token
In the Envia Configuration tab, enter the Envia Sandbox Access Token
Insurance percentage: If insurance is needed...
The package is specified in mm and kg
Leave the weight as `0` if no weight is reported
set the max weight to `0` if there is no specified limit
Envia Package Type: Set to Box by default

To use Envia.com to generate shipping labels
...the selected Customer has a valid phone number
...the selected Customer has...email address
...the selected Customer has...shipping address
select the Customer field to open their contact page. Here, add their shipping address in the Contact field
add their shipping address in the Contact field
along with their Mobile number
and Email address
Ensure all products in a delivery order have a specified Weight in the Inventory tab
Ensure all products in a delivery order have a specified Weight
make sure to set the address for correct label generation
Each country has rules regarding how an address is filled.
- Argentina ... - Province
- Brazil ... - Neighborhood
- Chile ... - Region
- Colombia ... - Department
- Guatemala ... - State
- Mexico ... - State
- Uruguay ... - State
In Brazil the address is split to comply with regulation
In Brazil ... street_name is used for the street name only.
In Brazil ... street_number1 is used for the street number
In Brazil ... street_number2 is used for the complement.
This logic also applies if the Extended Addresses module is installed.
when using the EDI for Mexico (Advanced Features) module, the Colony field is required.
